title: [Bug]: 将MySQL存储过程的代码导入Oceanbase时不兼容
description: 将MySQL存储过程的代码导入Oceanbase时，json 类型会被强行转化成 longtext 类型。
key_bug_features: JSON type forced to longtext during import
bug_features_seed: CREATE PROCEDURE p_json_test() BEGIN DECLARE jdata JSON;
SELECT JSON_OBJECT('test', region) INTO jdata FROM (SELECT NULL AS region) AS x;
